name: Regional Sales Drop + Fuel Shock
description: Three compounding signals hit Lahore distribution simultaneously

input_signals.content: Q2 sales report: Lahore region orders declined 25% vs Q1. Top SKUs affected: Electronics (down 30%), Appliances (down 22%). Southern distribution routes showing highest drop. Revenue impact: PKR 3.2M gap vs Q1.
Breaking news: Pakistan fuel prices increase 18% effective immediately. Petrol now PKR 295 per litre up from PKR 250. Transport and logistics industry warning of immediate cost pass-through.

Vendor notification from Ali Traders Karachi: Lead times extended from 2 weeks to 5 weeks due to port congestion at Port Qasim. Affects approximately 40% of our SKU catalog. No resolution timeline given.
